lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: That merchant gave you extra tea leaves yesterday. Kindness, not profit.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: He wanted me gone faster. Don't mistake convenience for virtue.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Or maybe both things exist in the same person. Ever consider that?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: People aren't both things, Alon. They're just better at hiding one.
